subcodes.first_line: O concourse of earth! Fear ye God and follow not those whom the world hath beguiled with its deceitful vanities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا الارض اتقوا الله و لا تتبعوا الذین غرتهم الدنیا بغرورها
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @chastisement and requital, @proclamation to the people of the world, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @power of the Manifestation of God, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @praise and encouragement
